item.title: It’s almost like when you only offer social services to people in the military people are gonna join the military when you destr...
item.description:
It’s almost like when you only offer social services to people in the military people are gonna join the military when you destroy social service

item.title: By the way, that truth and reconciliation process starts with the abolition of the oppressive body named Israel
item.description:
By the way, that truth and reconciliation process starts with the abolition of the oppressive body named Israel. Should’ve made that more clear.#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: The fight in Israel is whether they become a religious supremacist state or a ethno supremely state - not whether they should st...
item.description:
The fight in Israel is whether they become a religious supremacist state or a ethno supremely state - not whether they should stop being either

item.title: This is not a symptom this is not an accident this is not an outlier - it’s the function of the US military which was built on t...
item.description:
This is not a symptom this is not an accident this is not an outlier - it’s the function of the US military which was built on the promise of unlimited access to women in other country’s body’s - and there is no reforming that #greenscreenvideo

item.title: I’ll take my W thank you very much (ofc ironically this rests at the feet of Palestinians who have worked tirelessly to desperat...
item.description:
I’ll take my W thank you very much (ofc ironically this rests at the feet of Palestinians who have worked tirelessly to desperate and undermine Zionist propaganda and forces)
